note: Day 30 (Monday). First weekday after post-campaign Saturday hold. All Batch 1-4 email sequences assumed complete as of 2026-04-24 (fu_049 = final campaign send). IMAP gap: 23 days (last confirmed: 2026-04-04). No Batch 5 Ryedale data received. LinkedIn channel in HOLD — no active outreach. Warm pipeline leads 1/3/22: final close emails assumed sent 2026-04-25 (Friday). Now Day 2 of 7-day buffer — LinkedIn nurture available from 2026-05-02. Key change from Saturday: Monday = no weekend rule. Batch 5 data return is the single highest-priority action today — if received, BRAIN writes copy same session.

linkedin_post_close_option.rule: If leads 1/3/22 received final close 2026-04-25 and do not reply within 7 days: LinkedIn nurture is permissible as a soft last attempt. Do NOT reference the email outreach or any prior contact.
linkedin_post_close_option.pre_generated_notes: All three notes pre-generated in linkedin_connection_notes.json warm_pipeline_nurture_notes. Char-counted. Ready.
linkedin_post_close_option.caveat: If any of these three leads reply to the email at any point — even to decline — LinkedIn is permanently closed for that lead. IMAP check required before sending any LinkedIn note.
linkedin_post_close_option.imap_gap_risk: 23-day IMAP gap means a silent reply is plausible. HANDS: sweep IMAP immediately and write any replies to new_replies.json before assuming these leads are still silent.

batch_1_4_summary.root_cause: HANDS execution latency — LinkedIn window (Day 3-6) missed on every batch of candidates across all 30 campaign days
batch_1_4_summary.channel_verdict: Architecturally ready. Operationally unexecuted. BRAIN intelligence layer functioned correctly; HANDS execution layer did not execute on any of 10 consecutive runs.

batch_5_revised_protocol.mandatory_same_session_rule: HANDS must search, check posts, and send note in ONE SESSION on Day 3, 4, 5, or 6. Do not split across days.
batch_5_revised_protocol.brain_flagging: BRAIN will mark Day 3 LinkedIn send day with MANDATORY flag in daily_signals.json with a 2-hour execution target.
batch_5_revised_protocol.profiles_json_requirement: HANDS must write linkedin_profiles.json immediately after each search session — whether or not a note was sent.
batch_5_revised_protocol.target_turnaround: Within 2 hours of BRAIN run on Day 3-6. Maximum: same calendar day.
batch_5_revised_protocol.fallback_escalation: If HANDS cannot execute within the window: log in CHANGELOG.md with reason. Do not skip silently.
batch_5_revised_protocol.weekend_rule: LinkedIn Day 3-6 window falling on a weekend: hold to Monday. Exception: if Day 6 is Sunday and Day 7 fires Monday — send Sunday 18:00+.

hands_priority_order_today_monday: 1. IMAP SWEEP — 23-day gap. Do FIRST before any other action. Check ALL leads. Write results to new_replies.json immediately. If any warm pipeline lead (1/3/22) has replied: cancel their LinkedIn option.
2. Batch 5 Ryedale data — if in hand: return immediately. BRAIN writes copy today. LinkedIn window opens Thursday 2026-05-01.
3. Confirm final close emails for leads 1/3/22 sent 2026-04-25. If NOT sent: send today. Log in CHANGELOG.md with timestamp.
4. Confirm fu_046-049 send status in CHANGELOG.md.
5. Confirm and send any of fu_036-045 not yet sent — Day 18 is the last acceptable day for breakup emails.
6. Blocked leads: Companies House (49 — 30 days overdue), phone call (51), Rightmove/Zoopla (53), info@ (54).
7. Write linkedin_profiles.json for any LinkedIn searches done in past 10 BRAIN runs — retrospectively, for campaign records.
